---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Software — Soumik Purkayastha"
---

```{=html}
<!-- Page header -->
  <header class="page">
    <div class="eyebrow">Software</div>
    <h1 class="page-title">Open-source R packages for biomedical statistics.</h1>
    <p class="page-intro">
      A small portfolio of open-source R packages developed alongside the methodological work described on the <a href="#">Research</a> page. Each package implements a method from a peer-reviewed paper or in-progress manuscript. Issue reports, pull requests, and questions are welcome through GitHub.
    </p>
  </header>

  <!-- Current packages -->
  <section class="page-section">
    <div class="section-meta">Current packages</div>
    <div class="pkg-list">

      <article class="pkg-entry">
        <div class="pkg-meta">
          <div class="pkg-name">fastMI</div>
          <div class="pkg-tags">R · published</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-content">
          <p class="pkg-tagline">Fast and consistent copula-based nonparametric estimator of mutual information.</p>
          <p class="pkg-paper"><em>Purkayastha &amp; Song (2024). <a href="#">Journal of Multivariate Analysis</a>, 201:105270.</em></p>
          <div class="pkg-links">
            <a href="#">GitHub</a><span class="sep">·</span><a href="#">Paper</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="pkg-entry">
        <div class="pkg-meta">
          <div class="pkg-name">causalGEM</div>
          <div class="pkg-tags">R · published</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-content">
          <p class="pkg-tagline">Bivariate causal discovery via the generative exposure model.</p>
          <p class="pkg-paper"><em>Purkayastha &amp; Song (2026). <a href="#">Statistica Sinica</a>, DOI: 10.5705/ss.202025.0236.</em></p>
          <div class="pkg-links">
            <a href="#">GitHub</a><span class="sep">·</span><a href="#">Paper</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="pkg-entry">
        <div class="pkg-meta">
          <div class="pkg-name">swaoBN</div>
          <div class="pkg-tags">R · in development</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-content">
          <p class="pkg-tagline">Survey-weighted, covariate-adjusted ordinal Bayesian network learning.</p>
          <p class="pkg-paper"><em>Purkayastha, Frank, Russell &amp; Hausmann (2026). Manuscript in submission.</em></p>
          <div class="pkg-links">
            <a href="#">GitHub</a><span class="sep">·</span><a href="#">Preprint</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="pkg-entry">
        <div class="pkg-meta">
          <div class="pkg-name">FedGEE</div>
          <div class="pkg-tags">R · in development</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-content">
          <p class="pkg-tagline">Federated generalized estimating equations for privacy-preserving population-level inference in multicenter longitudinal data.</p>
          <p class="pkg-paper"><em>Chang &amp; Purkayastha (2026). Manuscript in submission.</em></p>
          <div class="pkg-links">
            <a href="#">GitHub</a><span class="sep">·</span><a href="#">Preprint</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="pkg-entry">
        <div class="pkg-meta">
          <div class="pkg-name">comet</div>
          <div class="pkg-tags">R · published</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-content">
          <p class="pkg-tagline">Collider–mediator testing using information theory.</p>
          <p class="pkg-paper"><em>Purkayastha &amp; Song (2024).</em></p>
          <div class="pkg-links">
            <a href="#">GitHub</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Earlier work -->
  <section class="page-section">
    <div class="section-meta">Earlier work</div>
    <div class="pkg-list">

      <article class="pkg-entry">
        <div class="pkg-meta">
          <div class="pkg-name">SEIRfansy</div>
          <div class="pkg-tags">R · CRAN</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-content">
          <p class="pkg-tagline">Extended SEIR compartmental model with false-negative correction and symptom-based testing for COVID-19 surveillance.</p>
          <p class="pkg-paper"><em>Bhaduri, Kundu, Purkayastha et al. (2022). <a href="#">Statistics in Medicine</a>, 41(13):2317–2337.</em></p>
          <div class="pkg-links">
            <a href="#">CRAN</a><span class="sep">·</span><a href="#">GitHub</a><span class="sep">·</span><a href="#">Paper</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

    </div>
  </section>
```
